hooks.command: sh -lc 'case "$FURL_PRETOOL_PIPE" in 1|true|yes|on|enabled) uv run --no-project --with "furl-ctx[mcp]==1.1.0" python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/pretool_pipe.py" ;; esac; true'

sh -c '[ "$FURL_STATUS_LINE" = "0" ] || printf "%s" "{\"systemMessage\": \"furl 1.1.0 · engine furl-ctx 1.1.0 — PostToolUse compression armed; store: per-project (~/.furl); verify: furl_stats\"}"; true'
